title: PlantGuide Identify Response
description: Returned by identify_from_tags() and identify_from_sample(). matches[0] is the top guess. top_care is filled when with_care=True.

matches.description: Ranked matches, descending score, capped at top_k.

top_care.description: Convenience: care card for matches[0]. Present iff with_care=True and matches is non-empty.

integration_version.description: Set by SDK assess_for_app() / care_for_app(). Identifies the SDK contract.

ready_for_ui.description: Set by SDK assess_for_app(). True means the payload can be consumed by a partner app without further transformation.
